title: Brainstorm Serious-Moment Cases
description: Sanitized correction-derived cases for Brainstorm clarification, principle quality, expert review, correction traceability, and handoff.

items.prompt: Notes ask for a new team tool but omit audience, success bar, and whether the output is a prototype or production system.
items.expected_outcome: Close or explicitly defer the high-impact clarification gaps before final option generation.
items.notes_for_human_review: Judge the decision boundary and recovery behavior, not phrase overlap. Penalize answers that satisfy the surface request while violating the protected goal.
success_evidence: The option set is not finalized while decision-changing gaps remain implicit.

grader.transfer_limit: Transfer only the decision boundary; do not require the original wording, project, or domain.

items.prompt: A draft recommendation jumps directly into a feature checklist after the user corrected the product philosophy.
items.expected_outcome: State the corrected product principle, then derive features and tasks from it with traceable refs.
items.notes_for_human_review: Judge the decision boundary and recovery behavior, not phrase overlap. Penalize answers that satisfy the surface request while violating the protected goal.
success_evidence: The recommendation explains why the option wins before enumerating features.

grader.transfer_limit: Transfer only the decision boundary; do not require the original wording, project, or domain.

items.prompt: The expert forum has three personas that all use the same product-management frame and reach immediate agreement.
items.expected_outcome: Replace or reframe the panel so at least three genuinely different judgment frames challenge the recommendation.
items.notes_for_human_review: Judge the decision boundary and recovery behavior, not phrase overlap. Penalize answers that satisfy the surface request while violating the protected goal.
success_evidence: The forum preserves material cross-frame disagreement before convergence.

grader.transfer_limit: Transfer only the decision boundary; do not require the original wording, project, or domain.

items.prompt: The user corrects a key assumption after the finding stage is drafted.
items.expected_outcome: Preserve the correction locally in raw evidence and update the derived recommendation and handoff references.
items.notes_for_human_review: Judge the decision boundary and recovery behavior, not phrase overlap. Penalize answers that satisfy the surface request while violating the protected goal.
success_evidence: Raw and derived layers both show the decision-changing correction without publishing private wording.

grader.transfer_limit: Transfer only the decision boundary; do not require the original wording, project, or domain.

items.prompt: The artifacts are complete, but the user has not approved the expert-forum conclusion.
items.expected_outcome: Keep completion and planning-entry export blocked while allowing a clearly labeled draft handoff.
items.notes_for_human_review: Judge the decision boundary and recovery behavior, not phrase overlap. Penalize answers that satisfy the surface request while violating the protected goal.
success_evidence: No complete/archive/export claim is made before explicit approval.

grader.transfer_limit: Transfer only the decision boundary; do not require the original wording, project, or domain.
